reviews.review_text: Very nice caravan park.only negative was screeching birds sounded like someone screaming

We had a fantastic stay here. Stay were very helpful and accommodating. We had a big family/friend group of around 40 people staying across different types of accommodation. All very good.  Amenities were great and fabulous pools and gardens. Food at the Cafe was high standard.
Easy to find and well priced compared to other parks in the area. Clean and tidy.
A superb place to stay near town in Cairns. Great amenities and a beautiful place
The "safe/secure" spot to stay in Cairns from all the local "intelligence"

This place is amazing. I am in a wheelchair, everything was accessible to me. My room had great parking an easy ramp and great space inside with easy shower access. I could move around the whole park with ease. Very family / children orientated but there is something for everyone.

Great place to stay , the staff a friendly and accommodating,  the grounds are well kept along with the amenities , the only thing I could say against this place and its really not the parks fault is how close the main highway is with traffic noise and the smell of exhaust fumes at peak times other than that its a very quite park with no problem people if you get my drift 👍
THIS PLACE IS EPIC!! Pools everywhere, slides, go karts, everything!  The rooms were cozy, good cost value and a cool place especially for the kids.

Clean, safe, open, relaxed a breathe of fresh air compared to some camp sites. Clean showers, many toilets, clean cooking area and sink, amazingly maintained gardens… lovely phone service by the receptionist super friendly and helpful. I felt instantly relaxed and safe brought the dog too. Would return. Honestly a great park. 5 stars
Great for families. Lots for kids to do.

We have stayed at some of the best hotels around the world and Ingenia Cairns could teach most of them a lot. Our villa was spotlessly clean with everything we needed for a family holiday for seven including the kids. The kids loved every moment of the stay which made it enjoyable for all of us. I was very impressed with the pride that the resort takes in the upkeep and appearance of the resort. |We are already planning our next stay.
As always, the resort always satisfies our stay and experience! The kids enjoyed the activities. The place is always clean and overall a very family friendly accommodation! 10/10 ⭐️

This place is very excellent for families with kids, the amenities and entertainment is top tier, the staff are so helpful and nice
Couldnt recommend a better holiday park in the whole of Australia

Great place for the family! Lots of things for the kids to do with huge caravan site with plenty of grass. Staff super family and helpful.

Would highly recommend

This was the best park we have ever stayed at. There are so many activities for the kids & adults - mini golf, heated spas,playground, pools, water slides, splash park, jumping pillows, tennis & basketball courts, movie theatre, gym! The whole park was very clean & easily accessible. The kids (1yo & 8yo) had so much fun. It has rained for most of our stay but is still enjoyable. 10/10 for everything. You won't regret staying here 😊

We have been visiting Cairns Coconuts each year for 10 years now!! My family love it and still get excited about visiting each time..it's the most clean and friendly caravan park with something for all ages. We ended up getting in on a cancellation for Easter this wkd and can't wait!! If you haven't visited, you need to book now!!

Best family friendly holiday park in Qld hands down, everything you need and want all in the one place, fun for the kids and adults . Definitely worth the visit and if you can stay for a week, so you can enjoy all that the park has to offer.

We had such a wonderful stay here. The rooms were clean and very well equipped although we only cooked for 1 night as their onsite restaurant did the best pizzas and hot chips. So much to do here we didn't leave. Will be back again soon so I can challenge my husband at mini gold again.

This was my second stay now, we upgraded to the new poolside villas and wow!! You cannot find a better resort with what’s included in the price. The staff are amazing, they all seem to live working there .

This the most magical place for kids to stay in the summer with so many different outdoor activities. The cabins are clean ++ and comfortable. The staff are friendly and accommodating.

However, the security at Coconuts is lacking significantly. You should have a right to feel safe on holidays but unfortunately we were not. Our car was stolen and driven through the boom gate with the security guard not even batting an eyelid at our car going through the boom gate. And when meeting the estimator to fix our car he was able to point out a few other cars in his yard that were also stolen from coconuts so our situation is not just a once off.

Feedback for the resort:

Put up an electric gate rather than a boom gate. Thieves are far less likely to actually be able to drive through a big gate.

Have multiple security guards on at night. One at the front gate and a few patrolling the park. Security guards that are proactive would be very useful too.

People don’t want to come back to a hot cabin. Stop connecting the air con key and the door key. It creates a security risk where people have to choose between comfort and security. Why can’t you have both on holidays?
We highly recommend this place. It's a good location, there's plenty for the kids to see and do, and it's overall a good atmosphere.
Very clean, awesome facilities and such a holiday vibe!!! We enjoyed aqua aerobics with Carla a lot!!!

My stay at Ingenia Holidays was such a pleasant experience from beginning to end. There’s no admission fee, which makes it easy to pop in and settle straight into the relaxed atmosphere. I stayed for a few days, but it’s definitely the kind of place where you could happily spend much longer.||The atmosphere was calm, family-friendly, and very welcoming. It had that classic holiday park charm with modern touches that made it feel both comfortable and refreshing. The crowd size was just right enough people to create a friendly vibe without feeling cramped or noisy.||The staff were absolutely lovely, always greeting guests with genuine smiles and offering helpful advice on local attractions. You can tell they care about keeping the place well-run. It’s best for families, couples, or anyone looking to unwind in a clean, safe, and community-style setting.||For value, Ingenia Holidays really delivers. The accommodation was spotless, well-equipped, and great for the price. Between the clean facilities, relaxed atmosphere, and friendly service, it’s an easy choice for anyone wanting a comfortable, stress-free getaway.

We have not stayed at an Ingenia before - and this one must be the crown in their jewels!!! To give a fair review we tried to see and do as much as possible - the massages were fantastic, the entry into reception was beautiful, the 2 spas were amazing, the pools were fabulous and we especially loved the water slides. We missed out (due to time) on the 2 big jumping pillows, the outdoor cinema and we did not do the kids playground and other stuff (as we are mostly adults)  The shop and cafe were fantastic and so convenient. The place is immaculate and always stayed that way in the 2 weeks we were there. The staff are as amazing as the place. Our 2br spa was fantastic - honestly there is nothing negative to say about this place (and we tried to find it ha ha)

We absolutely loved staying at BIG4 Ingenia Holidays Cairns Coconut and ended up coming back multiple times throughout our trip around Queensland – it became our go-to spot whenever we were passing through or needed a comfortable base!
From the first check-in, the staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, always greeting us with big smiles and going out of their way to help with local tips, booking tours, or just a quick chat. The whole place felt spotless – rooms were clean, fresh, and well-maintained every single time we returned. No mould, no weird smells, just bright, airy accommodation that was a real treat after long drives or camping stretches.
The facilities are fantastic too – great pool for cooling off in the Cairns heat, clean amenities blocks, and plenty of space to relax. It’s family-friendly but perfect for couples or solo travellers as well. Location is super convenient for exploring the reef, city, or heading north/south.
We kept choosing to come back here because it was reliable, comfortable, and genuinely enjoyable – a real highlight of our trip. Highly recommend – you won’t be disappointed!

Rooms are a little dated in the 2br deluxe but very clean and comfortable.
Location right next to the highway but when you look the other way at the mountain ranges in the clouds it's pretty easy to block out the road.
Great place for the kids. Pools were great and the service was second to none. Beautiful maintained grounds.
We'll be back in a heartbeat.
Great place for familys
Great for kids to play in pools or outdoors.
We loved our weekend stay. The facilities were clean, the water Parks were really great for our 5 yr old and the park overall was fantastic. The cabin was neat and very comfortable
Great place to unwind and relax. Fantastic facilities all round.

מקום לקרוון מסודר לקחנו בתוספת מקלחת ושרותים צמוד .
המטבח הציבורי נקי הכל מצוחצח .
תענוג אמיתי
בריכה נחמדה מיני גולף ועוד לילדים .
Great place for my daughter to stay for the week.
An amazing, well equipped and well run resort. The 3 bedroom single storey cabin was excellent for 6 of us, and the pools, bars and cafes were amazing. We strongly recommend this resort.
This was mine and Sam’s second time visiting, but this time we went with some family. This resort is perfect for families!
The park is very well maintained and has a lot to keep you busy inside the park between reef trip days and rainforest exploration

A wonderful place to stay particularly for families with children. Not only are the facilities well maintained, it caters for needs and wants of children and adults alike. Positioned conveniently close to the airport and town centre. Highly recommended.
There was like 5 cockroaches in the cabin but the place was pretty nice and the waterpark thing was fun

I would definitely go back. We were staying at a villa, it was all new, clean, very well equipped. Staff is very kind. Great place to visit with a family. Best to have a car if you wanna visit things. We came in January, wet season. AC was great. I wouldn’t change a thing (maybe just the pedal cars need to be renovated).

Nice park staff are nice but lifeguard takes her job to seriously the only down side is the cleaning to my surprise when I lifted the bed found drugs under the bed specially in a kids room plus also u could see it hadn’t been cleaned
Fancy having to pay to visit friends/ family that are staying there.
Great facilities and friendly staff

We previously stayed 8 years ago and had recommended to everyone we met. This visit there were a few changes, which may be good for some and not as good for others. The splash water park has been renewed and was great. The whale slide in the lagoon pool looks grimy and dated. There is a new snack drink shack which is a good addition though seems to emphasise alcohol. Adventureland minigolf and bounve areas were all amazing, unfortunately the NEOS was out of order the whole time we were there. The restaurant/shop staff were incredible though food choices were limited to fast food, would be good to have sone vegetables, salads and fruits on tge side. The pizza and burger were a hit with the kids. Again there was an emphasis on alcohol. The range and variety of foods were much better 8 years ago. Cabins are much the same. The biggest dissapointment was the loss of the shuttle servive which was an amazing link into Cairns especially to be able to attend booked activitues and tours and still enjoy the amenities back at the park. Overall the amenities for families are great and a welcome escape for families with a busy holiday schedule. Ideal if you have a car or are travelling through, withoit the shuttle service and range of healthier options at cafe, i would opt for somewhere in the city for our next visit.

10/10. I simply love this place. Cairns coconut is genuinely the best resort I’ve ever been to in cairns. The staff is friendly and welcoming, The Palm Bar is amazing, the pool is wonderful, and the view is amazing with a lot of facilities like a barbecue nearby.

Big4 Cairns Coconut was a very good choice for a short getaway for myself (70yo) my daughter (46yo) and my grandson (5yo). There were suitable activities for all of us. We stayed for 3 nights and the total cost was $1091 which was good value considering all the activities and facilities available.

It was great to have our own cooking facilities in the 2br 1bathroom Luxury Villa. We also appreciated having a front deck area to sit when we weren't out at activities. My grandson enjoyed the gardens which made him feel more at home. The negatives I found were uncomfortable mattresses on the bunk beds, 2 cockroaches, and quite dated decor for the price. However it was adequate for our needs and the layout of the rooms was very good.

The reception area/office seemed to always be very busy and at one point I felt the stress of the person serving me there... like I was a nuisance with my minor request. I was quite glad I made my booking online and got all my info from the website. Overall though the service was good and it was handy to have a small shop in the park for occasional items. We didn't need to leave the park for our whole visit.

We plan to go back to Cairns Coconut, hopefully for an annual getaway.

Big4 Cairns Coconut is the best caravan park I’ve ever been to. We spent 12 days with our family, and the park offers a wide range of activities to suit everyone’s. The villa we stayed in was spacious and comfortable, and the park was surprisingly quiet considering the number of people. The waterpark and slide were the highlights for the kids.

Great caravan park with tons to do for kids. Loved our stay and this was even though it rained almost every day. Wet season, what can you do. Had fun with the mini golf, laundry facilities were great and the rest we'll have to check next time.
Absolutely fantastic park. Great for the kids, clean and fun. Sites are ample. Really 5 star.

I have been going to this resort since around 2014 to 2019 and you have destroyed every aspect of this resort that made it what is was by plastering ingenue holidays all over it. you should be ashamed at what was once a family run business into corporate greed.

What an awesome place to stay. The park is clean, well maintained, and has a great relaxed holiday vibe. The pools and facilities are fantastic, especially for families, and there’s plenty to do without feeling overcrowded. Great free holiday program for the kids, we felt safe and with the bar and cafe there is no reason to leave!
Staff are friendly and helpful, the grounds are spotless, and everything feels well organised. It’s close enough to Cairns to be convenient, but far enough out to be peaceful.
Great facilities, great atmosphere, and a really enjoyable stay. Would happily come back and highly recommend it. Can’t wait to rebook.
Great if you have young family
Perfect family holiday destination, kids loved it

This is definitely the place for family holiday. This holiday park offers Different types of villas and accommodation options. Fully furnished and everything to make your stay comfortable. It has a restaurant and shop on the grounds and family activities in the afternoon with great food and cocktails. There is a play area, movie night outside on grass, put-put. Swimming pool with slides, another swimming pool for the whole family and and amazing swimming play pool for the little ones. Tennis court, basketball court. Huge Jumping pillows. 2 big Laundry facilities. A few BBQ facilities. And so much more. I highly recommend this place.
Très bien WC revoir la propreté.
Great family get away with everything you could possibly need
Great for kids
Outdated and not worth the price tag.
Great

I recommend to tell your family and friends to come here it's a family friendly safely holiday park for you and your kids to come here it's  relaxing ,kids can have fun and adults too an good service the staff a inviting it's just a good atmosphere I be back next year
Great place for the family to have a little staycation at. fun at the water park and rooms are nice and tidy.

The resort is good and nice with premium quality .||We arrived late and the reception has already closed . The security officer helped us to retrieve our room key and brought us to our room . ||The staff were friendly and they gave us very good service and assurance at all times that they were willing to help .||The facility were good and the room is clean and comfortable

Muy buena ubicación, estaba todo impecable, los baños, la zona de parrilla, la zona de la secadora, el dump point. Cuentan con instalaciones y piscinas para niños, ideal. También tienen una cafetería, una tienda de comestibles y hasta una gasolinera.
La verdad que estuvimos muy agusto, volvería y lo recomiendo
One of the best holiday parks on the east coast. The amenities are amazing.

We went there this year for Easter (April, 2025)… words are not enough to describe how much we loved it!! BEST BIG 4 in AUSTRALIA (we have been to many, believe me!). We were there with our 2 boys (5 and 7 yrs). So many kids’ activities, from free pancake morning to snorkelling lessons, ice cream competition, glass sculpting, the magician, movie night, also the pools were fantastic..there was even a kids’ spa. Something for everyone. Also a special thanks to the behind the scenes people i.e. the cleaners, gardeners, maintenance people, to keep this facility so clean. You guys obviously work so hard to keep the property immaculate. We will be back next year (Easter 2026). The ones reading this review.. what are you waiting for? Book a holiday now. Trust me you won’t be disappointed. Highly recommend and yes 10/10.

Can’t wait to be back!
Bibha and Abhishek
(From Melbourne)
Fantastic setup, plenty of pool/wet areas & activities, some that get the parents involved too. Comfy enough in the cheapest cabin, but go for a more expensive one if you can, gives you more space.
Le top, tout est parfait, logements, emplacements, entretien ! Un haut lieu du camping dans le Queensland

Prima campeerpkek. We stonden rustig onder de bomen. Er was genoeg te doen op het park maar wij zijn voornamelijk buiten het park geweest. De lagoon van Cairns is leuk om te bezoeken en dan zeker het regenwoud Daintree en de koraalriffen.
Veel vogels rondom ons geen.
Amazing facilities and always kept spotless. :)
Perfect place for Kids and Family. You can’t find better place than this for Families.

Cairns Coconut Grove is a great place to stay, kid friendly & so much fun. The cabins provide many alternatives and are super clean & well maintained. The Cairns team  have a ready smile, are caring,  organised and go out of their way to help. We  enjoy our break in the tropics  with our family.
Great holiday/van park ideally situated in Cairns. Van sites roomy and nicely segregated from each other. Amenities clean and well maintained. Highly recommend.

Lots of activities to keep kids busy and parents can join in or just chill and enjoy time out in hot or cold spa. Not too far off from Cairns City so hassle free commuting. Facilities well kept, serviced by friendly staff. Great time out with kids for no apparent reason but just fun. Definitely do again
Great park with lots of onsite facilities and activities, pools, cafe etc,
Toilet block was huge and too far from some sites.It wouldve been better had the amenities block been split into two rather than just 1 huge one.
Amazing spot,    kids had a great time.   Very well maintained and clean.
I loved this place. It is a shame they took the pineapple down.
Great Holiday park. Very large grass sites for large caravans. Plenty of room.
This is one of the best parks we have stayed inn great for families or couples tropical vacation well run

Camping de très bonne qualité avec tout ce qu'il faut.
Le seul point négatif c'est que toutes les activités, qui sont géniales, sont au bord de l'autoroute... Ce qui enlève un peu de son charme à l'endroit. La piscine quand à elle est plus éloignée et donc plus calme.
Camping fait principalement pour les familles.
Incredible Big4, good sized Caravan sites (we had a 22ft Van) and the facilities are excellent for kids, so much for them to do.

It's such a shame about the massive cockroach infestation in our cabin.
Otherwise, it's an amazing place.
The cabin was clean and well equipped, the park was tidy and the pools were clean. Overall, it's a kids' paradise. We had a really great time, but at more than $300/night proper pest management would be expected.
Espectacular lugar. Impecables los sanitarios y gran variedad de servicios aprovechables. Fuimos con mi hija en una caravan.
Fantastic customer service and facilities
We absolutely enjoyed our beautiful weekend away here. You really need a few days to soak it all up.
Enjouable
Great for the kids there was so much to do!

We’ve been traveling in Australia for 4months till now, it’s the best camping sites! You can get more services than you expect. I enjoyed their free breakfast(pancakes) on Thursday. Everyday they provide somethings special. I searched several camping sites in the center, but absolutely here is a golden choice(Due to theft and facilities issues, others are not good for us). Oh, it’s time to explore spa & swimming spots! Don’t hesitate to book here if you’re in Carins.

By far the best caravan park we've stayed at. It's very clean from the facilities to the rooms itself. Plenty to do, we didn't have enough time to do everything plus fit in exploring Cairns itself. Wish we stayed longer, we're already planning to come back we all loved it that much. Cannot rate this place highly enough!
A great place to stay with great facilities and plenty of things to do
One of the best parks in the country. Very clean and tidy park, well presented. Heaps to do on site, or chill out and do nothing! Great for kids and families.
Great friendly staff and an awesome family friendly accommodation. Highly recommend this place
All fantastic, very clean facilities, we had ensuite bathroom powered site. Beautiful pool, fantastic for the kids. Would come back any time when in the area.

I'm not sure why the gym wouldn't open earlier or leave unlocked as you can get a key,. Most people want to get on and get out early so they have tome to spend tlwith the family. The water slides open at 10am which I late enough but then to have a staff member turn up 10mins late while all kuds are waiting is ridiculous.
Also dog park, why have it locked up and open at 9am, dogs get up early too.
Great for kids and entertainment was great especially the disco for the kids, big hit
Great for families
Great location, accommodation that suits everyone and awesome facilities! Definitely recommend for a family get away!
Great location. Good space.

This would have to be the best park we have stayed at!
So far it outshines and outdoes itself on a daily basis! Choosing a caravan/holiday park in Cairns is easy with this one at the top of the list!

A fantastic place for a young family, as parents you dont have to think of the next activity fpr the kids as there is a water park, multiple pools and other activities for the kids, there is also happy hour each day for the adults
Excellent facilities and an easily to get to location. Will be back, even though we don't have kids.

Cairns Ingenia Holiday Park is a fantastic place for a family getaway! The pools, jumping pillow, and water park keep the kids entertained for hours, while the beautiful environment makes it so relaxing. The staff are always friendly and helpful, which makes the stay even more enjoyable. Highly recommend for both fun and relaxation.
What an amazing holiday park with everything you need there! I can’t believe how great this place was to stay and the kids didn’t get bored for 10 whole days of fun and relaxation for us ❤️
It was awesome! We stayed in a high rise cabin right near the splash park, so it was so easy to get there. The waterslides were super fun! The bunk beds were fun to sleep in.

Trop cher pour l’endroit.
Beaucoup d’enfants.
La télé qui hurle toute la soirée dans la zone cuisine à côté de laquelle était notre emplacement de Campervan.
Et une piscine très beauf et ultra bruyante : toutes les clims du camping tournent au bord de la piscine donc un vrombissement permanent.
Bref, on est sorti usé par les bruits incessants.
Ce n’est pas du tout un camping pour back Packer mais idéal pour les familles australiennes.

What a wonderful experience it was staying at Cairns Coconut. The facilities are amazing & there is so much to do to entertain little ones. The fully fenced waterpark is a standout. With a ND child who thinks it’s fun to do a runner, the fence helped us parent relax too. The staff are amazing. Special shout out to Angus! You my friend are a wonderful Human!

My daughter and I loved staying here, staff spoke nicely, but they have no respect for us. I'm a single parent who we both have just been verbally abused and daughter hurt by other tenants through Access Community Housing and we have nowhere to go because they didn't want to help us. Went through police as well, and even our Dr all can't believe how we've been treated for the past 2 years. We are waiting for Department of Housing to get us a home, but in the meantime we are running out of options where we can set up camp, especially while this weather is raining and then use expect me to still pack up and leave, but yet use have a single father with a son been living in there 2 tents and a gazebo since January and then another family with 2 kids have been living there already now for almost 10 weeks in tents. Why can't my daughter and I have respect like these people. We obeyed by all rules while there for a week, but use can't respect us. Use get your money. What's different between my little girl and I to the others?
Would have to be the most well kept caravan parks in stayed at .

We are beyond grateful to Jennifer and team. We have been making extended bookings here for the last few months and Jennifer is so quick to get back to me and help me whenever we need it.
I am beyond grateful for her being so accomodating.
Thank-you to the whole team.

Bus stop outside. Staff are so friendly.
Cabins etc look superb. We are in a powered site which is great.
Great family holiday! So much to do here, the kids didn’t want to leave. Lovely cafe onsite and friendly atmosphere all round
Very tidy grounds, scrupulously clean amenities .

The campsite is huge! Ideal for families! Very well kept and very friendly staff. The guests are very friendly too!
The price-quality ratio is good!
It has different proposals of activities to do every day, in addition to the tennis court, bascket, mini golf, gym, spa, swimming pool, etc.
I would come back without hesitation and would recommend it to anyone in Cairns!

El camping es enorme!! Ideal para familias! Muy bien cuidado y con un personal muy amable. Los huéspedes muy simpáticos también!
La relación precio calidad está bien!
Tiene diferentes propuestas de actividades para hacer día a día, además de la cancha de tenis, bascket, minigolf, gimnasio, spa, pileta, etc.
volvería sin dudarlo y se lo recomendaría a cualquier persona que esté por cairns!
Der beste Caravan Park in Cairns. Gut gepflegter und sauberer Park.
What an amazing park to stay at . … the location is beautiful. Park hounds have plenty of room and the amenities are very well looked after and clean. All round perfect place to stay .
Fantastic place to stay. Lots to do for the kids

My family and I stayed here in September 25. Lots of great things for the kids like the splash park, jumping mats, and the several swimming pools. Plenty of BBQ facilities around the park and a meal service.

Great staff and location , amenities lovely and clean , my one and only criticism would be that on our caravan site ( #7 ,) had a steel cover over something but was directly in line when backing a caravan in. I think it will be only a matter of time before someone punctures a tyre. A temporary quick fix would be to put some " fill " around the edges of the steel cover.

Amazing place for families. The kids lagoon pool is epic. The gardens and amenities are all super clean and well maintained. That giant bucket at the water park kept us entertained for ages. The takeaway food options from the Palm are all a bit beige (could use a salad or something green?) and fried, BUT that supreme pizza was a complete winner 🏆 would order even if not staying here.
What a fantastic park!!! Loved it so much ❤️

Our stay at this holiday park was really good. The layout of the park makes every amenity easily accessible and walkable. Their shop was very well stocked and the service was great too. We spent most of our time in the pool with the 2 slides. The kids had a blast. The park is located closed to the A1 so access is very easy and convenient.
Great big 4 caravan park, spotless and quiet except for some road noise, friendly staff, pretty lovely spot
Incredible park with facilities and  second to none in Cairns.

Very good holiday park with lots of cabins, caravan and camping spots
It has several pools one of which has a bar
There’s are lots of kids activities
There is a shop and a bar as well as a massage place
They even sell fuel
From the start the staff were so helpful and friendly. Super clean sites and facilities! There was live music at the happy hour that was excellent. All in all a great stay.
Great caravan park close to everything you need. Good massage therapist Thanks Noo

The facilities for kids, the water park, pool etc all deserve 5*, but that’s where the good news stops. We paid $3000 for 5 nights in a ‘superior’ villa. I can only imagine it was superior to sleeping in a tent because the amenities were non existent. It wasn’t clean, our feet were black from walking bare foot inside. The biggest flaw is the WiFi, it does not work. Yes you might be able to connect to a WiFi network but the speed is capped to such a limit that you won’t be able to send an email or load a web page, need to update an app, give it 30 minutes. Kids want to watch YouTube, no chance. That wouldn’t be the end of the world if the phone signal was reasonable, but the entire site has the same issue so you can use mobile signal during the day when everyone is in the pool, when it gets to 5pm the mobile signal grinds to a halt too. This might not affect some families, but in a modern age of remote working/studying the expectation to respond to emails, catch up on work briefly whilst on holiday is impossible. I had to get in the car and drive 5 minutes to full 5G signal and sit at the side of the road to use the internet.
Fantastic place if you're there with kids - lots of activities.

Family friendly, kids everywhere, walkways, swimming pools, tennis courts & bbq’s. Was quiet at night surprisingly. Our self contained Tropical Villa living area couch stained and dirty (we never sat on it, was sooo Yuk). Mattress also lumpy, hard and uncomfortable. Having to use a passcode on the barrier for exit as well as entry tiresome and complicated.
Honestly the cleanest, nicest camp ground I've ever stayed in. Everything about it was perfect. Staff, cabin, facilities, food and most importantly the best coffee I've had in all of Australia.
A great place to stay, ideal family spot if you have kids as there's plenty of things there to keep the kids busy
#1 choice is you’re taking a holiday with kids

Friendly staff and angle parking to make it easier with big rigs. If calling an uber make sure you wait inside the boom gates as there were questionable characters waiting outside and harassing us. One lady even came in and said she was with us and thought she'd have a wander around the park which isn't ideal. I reported her to staff at reception but they really need a stronger security presence to prevent this from happening. People pay a lot of $$ to stay and enjoy their holidays and don't need to worry about security of their belongings or about being hassled.
Otherwise a lovely park. 😊
Excellent park with lots to do and keep the kids busy.
Stopped for a honeymoon lunch, exceptional meals and drinks, amazingly helpful and friendly staff. Would definitely come again.
Great value food at the Cafe and really good cocktails!
Fantastic location and beautifully maintained. Price is reasonable for this awesome location

We had our van there for a week, sister inlaw booked a cabin near our site, the team couldnt have been more obliging in everyday, has a fuel bowser, shop, massage pedicures, tons of room for kids and all ultra handy to the main town.
Huge, very well maintained manicured caravan park with fairly large sites.
Great park has a bit of everything, great food from the café, pizzas were awesome, good for family's.
Bloody expensive but the kids loved it
Stated 4 nights in our caravan,fantastic park mini putt,swimming pools jumping balloon cafe ,bar ,shop and amazing stay
Family friendly so much so you don’t need to leave the park for anything!! 10mins to the CBD and ferry to Fitzroy Island which a whole day is needed for snorkelling and the summit walk.

This is by far the best Caravan park we have stayed in. We stayed in one of the newer 3 bedroom houses. Facilities are great. Heaps for the kids to do.
10/10
Very friendly staff in an excellent resort. Camping

Great facilities but our villa wasn't very good. The toilet had a gross smell on and off, and the shower pressure was very weak - plus it took ages to respond to temperature changes. Would probably stay again but not book a 2 bedroom villa. Bed was comfy and it was surprisingly quiet at night!
A beautiful caravan park for families and couples.  So well maintained and nice private sites for caravans.
On a site.  Well cared for only
Fantastic place for the whole family, so much to do and so relaxing. Staff are great 👍

This was our 10th year at Cairns Coconut, the only break was when we were exiled during Covid lockdowns in Victoria! The holiday park is the best one we’ve ever been to. Great cabins and amenities. The cafe is terrific and we also love Pancake Thursday! Close to the city and airport to enjoy all that Cairns has to offer. The photo was my view every morning for coffee and breakfast - not bad at all!

Ingenia sold us two bungalows with total 12 beds für 5 persons based on wrong information when booking! And were so inflexible as to stick to their "rules" and not reimburse money (although we used only one bungalow from the beginning ...). Terrible place!
Room's are to dear and times for acteverty all wrong 1 hour later
Amazing time with the kids! We will definitely be heading back.

Recently here for second time with an 7 year gap. Place is still very clean and quiet. 2 large great pools for both teens and smaller kids. Mini golf was still great and their awesome pancake morning.

They have stopped their minibus into Cairns but there is a local bus stop outside. About $38 in a Uber from the airport.  Can also get Woolies Direct straight to cabin.

A great place for families

We absolutely loved it here. The park is HUGE with so many things to do for families.

Despite traveling with just my husband, we loved it.

When booking I requested a large site due to the size of our tow vehicle and it turning circle.

They delivered.

We had a huge site. Easy to get into. With lovely neighbours.

We loved that there was a bar and small convenience store.

Amenities were plentiful and always clean. Interior roads are wide.

I would return in a heartbeat.

We stayed in our caravan. Even though it was school holidays and super busy, the place is big enough not to seem rushed. The kids, and big kids (me) enjoyed the heated pools and water slides, mini golf and the pedal karts. I would highly recommend staying here if you ever visit Cairns.
Good facilities, gym, pools, slides, even had a petrol station, just found the powered site we had was too small.
The staff is more than helpful and very friendly

Well set out,  location out of town but easy to get to.  Very spacious areas,  caters for adults with separate pool/ spa, outdoor gym and bar. Kids will love the pool, wet splash park,  jumping pillow, climbing frames,  basketball,  tennis,  mini golf,  movie screen and hire go karts. Beautiful grounds full of palm trees. Facilities like shower block and laundry are well laid out. Park is clean and staff friendly.

Highly recommend for families. Various configurations of self contained accommodation plus camping and caravan spots. Big array of activities within the park including mini golf, pools, pedal carts. Excellent on site cafe/restaurant

Excellent camping, tout est propre des douches à la camp kitchen alors qu'il y a beaucoup de monde, bravo au personnel de service. On a profité du jacuzzi après une grosse randonnée c'était parfait. Les emplacements sont bien. Il y a tout même une petite supérette, un restaurant, c’est vraiment parfait.

We had a great holiday. Although we booked all the usual tourist attractions my kids would have been more than happy spending the whole time here. They loved the water slides,  pools, jumping pillow, kids activities, playing tennis etc. The all you can eat pancake brekki was fantastic. Big, fluffy pancakes with plenty of options for toppings.

Make sure you have a car because the park isn’t in the nicest suburb (no nice walks to go on outside of the park), right next to the highway and is about a 10min drive into central Cairns.

The only negative is that they allow smoking. I could see ashtrays on all the decks I looked at which surprised me considering how many children stay in this park. We were next to some smokers for a day but thankfully they left and the next family were non smokers. I think if we were next to smokers our whole stay my review would be different. Thankfully that was not the case and we had a great time!
Good ensuite site for our caravan. Spacious ensuite with good hot water shower. Great pool & water park, cafe & licensed shop, laundry, grounds & gardens well cared for. Staff are helpful & friendly.
The staff here are amazing!! Very willing to help and the resort is super kid friendly with lots to keep them entertained.

The team at reception were professional and helpful, we received updates about security etc via SMS once we check in. We were staying in our caravan and the park has everything including fuel pumps. It's about 10-15 mins out of the city by car. Grounds were very well maintained, bathrooms cleaned regularly, which was needed as unfortunately some people are animals...it was school holidays so the park was packed. Would stay here again for sure
Great for kids, always something to do.
Great park. Safe, great amenities and close to town.
Amazing, love it. Evening thickshakes at Cafe fabulous. All positives here. Can't wait to come back

The tent site rented to us for a caravan had a tree right where the van door opened, chop it down! couldn't open awning, bloody tree! loud campers up until midnight nearby, on the cane train line very loud! Charged for caravan site, if you want space and peace dont come here! just abysmall! I would never come back!
Great experience thank you

My stay at BIG 4 Ingenia Holidays Cairns Coconut Resort to be fantastic!! The atmosphere was calm and relaxing, plenty activities to do and great food at the Cafe. As a guest with a disability, I had no problems with our cabin, with our bathroom being spacious,  rails and seat in bathroom.

I found my stay to be very comfortable and would recommend this resort to anyone.

Park is nice but gets crowded (even outside school holidays) and smoking is allowed at all campsites. We had someone smoking on a site beside us the whole stay, it was horrible. Staff offered to move us to another site but we were fully set up and there was no guarantee there wouldn’t be another smoker elsewhere.
Some guests also were not respecting the adult only areas and taking kids into the adult spa. This wasn’t managed well by grounds staff who just ignored it.
Overall it’s clean, staff were nice to us and there’s a lot to do but if you don’t like smelling cigarettes around the clock and don’t want to feel like you’re in the middle of a primary school type schoolies I wouldn’t reccomend it.

What a fabulous place, we stayed in the 2 Bedroom, 2 Bathroom Deluxe Cabin. It was directly across from the main big pool. Kids took themselves off to the pool whenever they wanted too(they are old enough to go on their own) there is something there for everyone. Even an onsite spa. Great cafe with good coffee. About 15 mins from Cairns main strip so a hire car was handy to have. Would recommend this place to anyone. Shops not far a small IGA or a little further away a SC with both Coles and Woolworths.
Great place to stay and the kids will love it. Very family friendly place with awesome swimming pools and slides.  Close to the town centre and restaurants nearby

Excellent park.
Fantastic  accommodation.   So much to do.  Great for the kids, so much to do.
Water aerobics, pools, spas.
Would definitely recommend.
Excellent park staff friendly

The best park in Cairns. Fantastic for couples and families. Caravan sites a big and well planned out.
The only thing that I can fault is they are still using 2 stroke trimmers. Nothing shatters the peace like a 2 stroke. 😂 I have made the suggestion that they switch to electric rechargeable units.
Not the cheapest place around, still reasonable ... great amenities and plenty of extra facilities you don't normally find in a park. Kids will love it here. Enjoyed stay and will definitely go back.

Amazing enjoyable I would 100% stay again for a fun holiday so many awesome activities. But wouldn’t book for a birthday party again as to many restrictions and deposit. The cabins, facilities and areas were always kept clean. There was so many activities for everyone to do. You’d never get bored. The staff were friendly and helpful they met all my requirements, including requesting a cabin right beside the playground and having my family stay in the cabin right beside me. We most enjoyed the big waterslides which everyone could go on, the kids really liked the new splash park. I didn’t like having to put a $20 deposit down for the key which I wasn’t made aware of until I checked in, you can’t leave the Aircon on if you lock the cabin as the aircon is only works when key is put in the switch. I didn’t like that you can only have birthday parties in the cabin which I wasn’t made aware of until after I booked when the staff said you can only have parties in the cabin, I just assumed you could have them at the barbecue areas where the pools are. than I had to book 2 cabins because it’s capped at 4 guest per cabin or my family wouldn’t of all been able to come, also guest have to pay $25 each to enter for the day. If you want to play mini golf you have to put down a deposit. otherwise perfect for a holiday or break has so many fun things to do is clean, well maintained with super friendly staff
Absolutely fantastic customer service family friendly all abilities friendly.  A relaxed environment and excellent accommodation
Can be noisy in tent as next to main roads

Excellent caravan park! What a fantastic selection of equipment for families and a couple like ourselves.
Offering activities,happy hour ,music, 🥞 mornings just to name a few.
I certainly enjoyed the complementary aqua aerobics class...the instructor was passionate, professional and also loads of fun!
Great work out.
Pleased we had a travel break staying 4 nights.
Close to Cairns,7 minutes by car.
Great place , access from and to the highway is difficult.

A great place to stay!
The cabin, facilities (pool, jumping pillow, slides, playground, gym, mini golf) and food were enjoyed by all members of the family.
Thank you to the staff who were always happy and helpful with different queries and provided above and beyond service. We had a great stay.

Very friendly staff, great location, very well kept garden's, excellent park 👏.
Cannot fault anything.
Great children's playground.
Campsites beautifully maintained.
Great park, especially if you have kids. Very large and busy, lots of facilities. Cost is a bit extreme. Had a fantastic Thai massage onsite, highly recommend

We stayed on a caravan powered side for a week, just beautiful and very tropical.The sites are manicured to perfection and the amenities are spotless. This would be one of the loveliest parks we have stayed in. Fantastic for children as they have everything a child could wish for. We Highly recommend this park.
Location is fine if you have a car. Cabin was very clean and comfortable. Great cafe, amazing service from every staff member . The grounds/gardens are stunning

Love coming here lots to do for the adults and the kids.

Great location and excellent park with professional staff that has a range of facilities to suit kids, to adults or us older folk. We had a large premium powered grass site that was massive. Great park lovely staff

Awesome park.

Self contained cabin was good for cooking but the beds were a bit too hard for good nights sleep. |The water activities were a big hit with the youngsters in the family. Overall experience ok. Kids enjoyed staying here and guess that's all that matters. Room was tired. Lots of marks all over walls some gross looking. Whole cabin, especially the bathroom is infested with ants. Every morning and night we would have to pick dead ants off toothpaste. Three cockroachs killed during stay. Aircon is controlled with a key that is attached and unremovable from main door key, so only works when you are present in the cabin. Inside of aircon in living area filled with mold.

Wij hebben erg genoten van onze verblijf hier. Ideale stop in Cairns tijdens onze reis rond Australië. Fijne sfeer, vriendelijk personeel en propere voorzieningen!

What a great place to stay and visit.
We have enjoyed our stay here and will be back in 2 weeks.

The most amazing park so much to do and so clean

The entire complex was very clean, cabins are great self contained, staff were super friendly, 2 pools, hot and cold spas, mini golf, outdoor movies, splash park, pedal karts, basket ball, 2 giant jumping pillows you don't need to leave the complex at all to have an amazing holiday. Absolutely loved our stay and we will be back at Christmas

Stayed at new double story villa which was 10 out of 10, new, roomy and great balcony , the park itself was one of the cleanest parks I’ve ever seen, the amenities were great just disappointed splash pool wasn’t completed as I was advised it would but other than that great facilities , milk bar and restaurant and staff in general are fantastic , can’t wait to go back
This is the most beautiful park to stay , staff are fantastic, its very clean and there is so much to do for the kids. Will certainly be back   here again

We come here every few years. You can spend your entire holiday just in the park with plenty to keep the kids amused (and extra events during kids holidays) or explore around Cairns and surrounds. Great place and likely to continue coming here until the kids are grown. Enjoy it while it lasts!
Awesome customer service,clean and comfortable cabin,highly recommend this park.

Super toller Campingplatz... nahezu all inklusive Hotel... sehr schöne ruhige Lage .. unzählige Möglichkeiten für Kinder jeden Alters... für Unterhaltung ist gesorgt ... super wifi ... es gibt sogar eine Tankstelle zum selben Preis wie außerhalb... die Anlage ist sehr sehr gepflegt und wunderschön .. alles wie beschrieben!
