The facilities were excellent and plenty of things for a family to on site, just pay a deposit for equipment and mostly everything was free of charge.
The grounds were very neat and we would recommend this park.

Stayed with them for 8 day, did not want to leave. Amazing holiday park with one sweeping pool with a small slide for little kids, another pool with two larger slides for kids starting 4yo and a separate water park / water slides.
It is possible to rent a go cart, there is mini golf, tennis court, basketball court, etc.
The facilities are not new but in a very good condition and really nicely maintained.
Highly recommend. We would stay with them again.
We liked that the Camper places had enough space and every space had some shadow from the trees next to it.

Stayed here with my wife and our 7 year old. It has everything you would expect from a holiday park. Our 7 year old loved it! Location is a bit further away from the happening places and attractions. Would be nice to see the customer service team smile more. We would stay here again:

Le plus beau camping de notre road trip
Location possible à l accueil avt 20h
2 piscines + SPA: super après une grosse journée
Sanitaires spacieux et propres
Tranquillité assurée
Y a même une station essence dans le camping

Amazing park! Had great roads for scootering, really good pools, and two fun slides! They were very understanding when we told them our car could not fit on our site, so they kindly moved us to a different site. We had a premium ensuite which was lovely and spacious. We also had dinner there. The food was not to die for, but it was still okay. Great laundry facilities with easy payment options. We looked at the amenities and they were nice and clean. Overall, love this park, and if we’re in Cairns again, we will definitely stay here!

A great place to stay and plenty for our 6 year old granddaughter to keep occupied.  Reason for 3 stars - As a Pool Safety Inspector,  I find the pool fencing very disappointing from a safety point of view. Outdated CPR signs, numerous gaps under fences exceeding 100mm, climbable issues and a gate that is literally falling apart. All this observed by walking past. I would assume more issues would be found with a thorough  inspection. Perhaps you could bring this up with your Inspector this year.

Great place to stay with the family.
Loads of fun activities. Movie room. Water slides and the food is reasonably priced for an on site restaurant. Kids meals are decent and good portions. Service is great too - needed some coins for the washing machine and they were more than happy to help out at the front counter.
Will definitely be back! Thanks Coconuts :)

Thank you for a lovley holiday  .this place is amazing will be back . Great place for kids my grandchildren loved it there too. I love waking up to the birds . The staff was friendly .the rms were very clean tidy .can't wait to come back thank you so much .
Just spent a week here with my family and some friends. The staff were amazing so friendly and welcoming. I highly recommend this place for a chilled get away.
An amazing location to relax with the grandkids for two weeks. The staff were friendly and extremely helpful. On site pizzas' and cocktails were fantastic. A great fun and safe place.

Trying to charge us $100 for leaving one bag of rubbish in the bin. Washed dishes in the dishwasher and one cupboard and bed was moved to accommodate the baby. 20 minutes of work for $100? Is the cleaner that fragile they can't move a bed one metre to the left?Please post these pictures of our accommodation on here so everyone can judge if that price sounds like the right evaluation. I know what your policy states before you respond with that same rubbish, but mate anyone in Cairns wants a job where obviously you get paid for doing minimal and a bonus for actually doing your job. Apply at this joint..  Oh but by the way , the bloke that checked us in. He was an absolute legend. Great customer service. Cheers 🥂
Great place to take the Grand kids. Lots of fun on the water slides.

This marked our third consecutive year visiting during the Christmas season, and it was undoubtedly the most disappointing experience we have encountered. Upon entering our room, we discovered that it had not been adequately cleaned. There were insects and cockroaches near the toilet in our cabin, hair present in the shower, and dust accumulated on the microwave and shelves. The bed was the most uncomfortable we have ever encountered during our family vacations. To make matters worse, on our final night, we decided to dine at the restaurant as a special treat, only to be informed that no food was available. There were no schnitzels, no chips, and no children's meals—only pizza. This holiday was an utter disaster

Amazing spectacular and the most enjoyable xmas we have had
First holiday as a family in 25 yrs and it was the best place staff were amazing facilities were amazing
Great place for the kids, pool party was a hit

One of the top 3 caravan parks in Australia we’ve stayed in, the best place for families!!

Pools: there are 3 pools, a kids splash park, a kids pool and a big pool with two slides (slides open from 10am - 5pm). There are spa pools at the big pool and kids pool as well.

Powered sites: the sites are very spacious with lots of trees between them. Lots of picnic benches and barbecues spread across the whole campground.

Amenities: lots of toilets available near the pools and public areas. The big amenities block near the caravan sites is always very clean, no matter the time of the day. Also the camp kitchen that’s close to us seems tidy and even has a herb garden!!

Reception/ staff: everyone we came across was super friendly, even on Christmas Day! A late checkin was organised for us without any dramas, all quick and easy.

Other activities:
* Minigolf with 18 holes. It’s for free, they just take a $10 deposit for the clubs.
* Baby/ toddler soft play area (near the laundry)
* Indoor gym (also near the laundry). We didn’t go inside but I’ve seen some bikes, a stepper, benches and weights.
* Golf cart and go cart hire
* Pool and table tennis

There is a petrol station within the campground and an ice/ water machine that’s accessible 24/7. They also have a little shop/ cafe/ bar, the shop was open on Christmas Day and has everything you need, water, eggs, milk, juice, cereal, sunscreens, goggles and so much more. The cafe serves food as well, see photo of menu attached.

This place was great! I booked an Airbnb that turned out to be not as advertised and full of mould, and after a 23-hour drive to visit my grandfather in hospital, I was a shattered mess. While I tried to sort out a refund on the Airbnb, my beautiful Husband, started ringing around and found us a gorgeous self contained cabin in the park, where we could have purchased furbaby Yoshie, stay with us. We had parking right beside the cabin, and everyone was super friendly. Unfortunately, due to circumstances, we didn't utilise any facilities except the little shop, bar and "cafe". A great price, easy to use the washing machines and we didn't hear any outside noise once our door was closed. We pln on returning for a holiday and will definitely stay there again. The only thing I could fault was the mattress on the bed, which sagged in the middle, causing us to roll into each other during the night and make for slightly sore arms and backs in the mornings great shower, good aircon and open plan kitchen lounge and dining

Didn’t realise how far it was from everything, a/c cannot be left on and during summer you come back to a very very hot room after a long day out site seeing,taking a very long time for a tiny a/c to cool the room down, otherwise room was clean, activity’s around the site were great for kids.

Rooms were very clean. We stayed for 7 days. Had our own washing machine and dryers so washed our own towels and sheets. The cabins didn't offer servicing. There was tea, coffee and milk in our fridge on arrival. Shampoo, conditioner in bathrooms free to use.
Staff were very polite and friendly. We were always greeted with smiles. Grounds were beautiful and kept immaculate. Not a leaf out of place. Pool was very clean with staff patrolling areas.
The whole park was great fun for the kids. There was lots to do. Free pancakes on Thursday mornings. Free snorkeling lessons in main pool Friday mornings. Outdoor movie night Friday and Saturday nights. Most things you pay a bond for and you get refunded when you give back the items. Mini golf, towel hire, table tennis, pool table balls. The crazy peddle bikes do have a charge of $15 for single bike and $20 for a twin. My boys 7 and 10 yrs liked the idea of the crazy bikes but the heat and the humidity made these hard to peddle. I'd recommend hiring early morning/afternoons to avoid the heat. There are plenty of things to do. Lots of other fun things around the park to cool down during the peak of the day.
We avoided the items in the shop as it was well over priced $24 for 500ml oil. Palm bar food was reasonable. Pizzas were around $20 each. Lots of toppings. Delicious.
Great location. IGA shops 2 min drive away. Very cheap. Lots of variety.
Free Wifi available. Very patchy internet. Works better by the pool. Wasn't a very strong signal in our room.

A magnificent park! We’re an adult couple so didn’t avail ourselves of all the children’s activities - except the pool!  We were there at the weekend and it seems that the locals see this as a great place to bring their kids for a free swim and fun day out. Children checking in with their camping parents are issued with a wrist band to wear when using the activities, but there were dozens of kids with and without parents, not wearing wristbands but enjoying the facilities.  Seems that the operators of the park turn a blind eye to the freeloaders!
Love this place and affordable

Cairns premiere holiday Park,all modern amenities..
I was looked after by Nat she was amazing..

Unser Aufenthalt im Cairns Coconut Holiday & Caravan Park war herausragend! Wir verbrachten Ende Oktober bis Anfang November zehn Nächte auf einem Powered Site mit Ensuite, und es hätte nicht perfekter sein können. Der Park bietet wirklich alles, was das Herz begehrt, und ist einer mit der besten Campingplätze, die wir in Queensland besucht haben.

Unser Ensuite-Stellplatz war sauber, komfortabel und bestens ausgestattet – ein echtes Plus an Privatsphäre und Bequemlichkeit. Die gesamten Anlagen sind top gepflegt, und es gibt eine unglaubliche Vielfalt an Aktivitäten und Einrichtungen, die den Aufenthalt spannend und entspannend machen. Die Pools sind riesig und sehr sauber und laden täglich zum Abkühlen und Geniessen ein.

Das Team vor Ort ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, und man merkt, dass viel Wert auf das Wohl der Gäste gelegt wird. Der Park ist auch ein idealer Ausgangspunkt, um Cairns und das umliegende tropische Paradies zu erkunden – ob das Great Barrier Reef, der Regenwald oder die malerischen Wasserfälle der Umgebung.

Wir haben jede Minute hier genossen. Für uns ist der Cairns Coconut Holiday & Caravan Park absolute Spitze! Danke an das Team für diesen unvergesslichen Aufenthalt!
Great holiday resort with no frills. Had a great time!

The worst place to stay.
Dirty cabins staffs doesn't come to change/replace fresh towels even after asking.
Happy to charge you for anything and everything but not happy to provide the service even after asking for it and when you go back to ask about what happened they act like you don't exist or talking in a different language that they don't understand. Waste of time and Money this place.  Would recommend to stay at backpackers joint than this caravan .. I would rather pay double to stay anywhere else but at this caravan.. I hope this would help someone to have a good holidays by not staying here ...... thank me later.

We stayed here in 2023 and loved it so much we had to stay here again to provision our 4wd campers ready for our across Australia adventure.||We had 2 x sites with ensuites.||Very friendly reception and very helpful.||Lots of activities for young and old.||Dog friendly.||Good bar and eatery on site.||Very safe, clean park.||Everything from tent sites to luxury cabins.||Thank you for another wonder stay even if it was only for 2 nights.

In October, we had an incredible holiday in Cairns, staying in a 3-bedroom Superior Skyview Villa. The villa was amazing—clean, spacious, and the beds were really comfortable. This place is fantastic for families with kids.

Living in New Zealand, I’ve never seen a holiday park this good at such an affordable price. I highly recommend it if you’re visiting Cairns.

If you're there over the weekend, make sure to check out the Rusty's market about a 10-minute drive from the holiday park. Open Friday to Sunday, it’s filled with tropical fruits and high-quality vegetables at great prices. Definitely try the banh mi and the pastry shop inside the market.

Love staying here. It's the bestest ever :)  Nothing to complain about at all. Not normal for me.

Heaps for the kids to do. And the adults only hot tub is wonderful:)

Stayed on a powered site. Nice facilities
We stayed at all the Caravan Parks in Cairns in a rooftop tent, this was by far the best 👌

Such a fanstaic place to stay with plenty to do and not far from anywhere central in Cairns. Cabins were cozy and clean and everything needed for a self contained dwelling. Plenty of facilities on site like laundry, pools, and play equipment. Fun activities to enjoy like mini  putt putt and outdoor cinema. Would stay here again in a heartbeat if visiting Cairns again.
Best holiday I’ve had

This is the best park we've stayed at on our trip from Brisbane to Cairns! The park is big and has everything you need for a family holiday or a couple's getaway. It's pet-friendly too! We had a site with a private bathroom, which was super convenient for our caravan. The bathroom was spacious and clean. On Thursdays, they even have free pancakes for breakfast! There are two large swimming pools, plenty of BBQ areas, and a great café where you can grab coffee and cocktails to go. I also want to mention the laundry—it’s really easy to use with lots of machines, and you can pay with a card. If we come back to Cairns, we'll definitely stay at Ingenia Holidays Cairns Resort again!

Stayed in a powered camp-site for 6 weeks. All sites are well maintained and amenities are tidy and in good condition. Staff are friendly and actually enforce the rules which makes sense as it is a very busy park.

Awesome for kids with all the slides and equipment to play on. Just look at their website theres loads to do. Not the right park for you if you were after off the grid or a quiet get away.

Close proximity to all the attractions in Cairns and an iga is 2 minutes up the road.

Also the mini mart/ cafe is awesome to have right there. Although there are cafes and bakeries close too sometimes it's just easier with the kids to get your coffee fix in the park.

They have security at night which gives you that piece of mind.

Great park! So much for the kids to do.
Our only downside was only one set of Toilets for sites and it was a hike for pretty much everyone
And an even bigger hike to any of the pools or kids stuff
I didn’t love the ladder to get out of the pool to go on the slides, it kept getting overwhelmed with people. With lots of little kids in the water trying to get out that couldn’t cos there was a line of adults or teenagers
Just seems like a disaster waiting to happen
We were upgraded to a lovely large cabin which faced directly into a mini-rainforest area.  As with just about all Big 4s we have experienced, staff are super friendly and rooms are comfortable.

Clean rooms. Excellent range of activities for kids! We went for an extended family holiday and loved it. The only negative is that it's a little drive out of Cairns so you'll need a car to easily access the city.
Fantastic for family holidays. Many activities to keep everyone happy.

Great facilities for the kids but the cabins are horrible. Paid $488 per night for a cabin that stunk of damp and mould.
Three stars for the kid focused facilities.
Would recommend staying here if you have your own caravan, but most definitely do not recommend the cabins
Absolutely love this Park! Clean,Friendly and So Much To Do for all the Family!
I absolutely loved my stay here. It's such a great place for family's to stay with so many options to keep the kids entertained.
Beautiful place, private bathroom fantastic. All facilities clean, staff great!

The third time back at Coconut Grove
This really is a five-star caravan park.
From the staff that greet you, to the cleanliness of the park and the size of the sites and facilities offered,
Best park l have stayed in.
Awesome park, kids had a ball, great pools.
Best place to stay with kids there is so much to do at the park you don't even need to leave
Great park but packed in sites a bit to small
I go each yr with my family for my brothers birthday

I was invited by my family to spend some precious family time away  ...I cannot complain about the park itself as it is wonderful for children with all the activities
I however can complain about the rooms as I came away with bed bug bites over my body ...how revolting  to have these in the bed while  you're sleeping makes me shiver now ...this shows the rooms are not clean ...there are cleaners cleaning rooms getting them ready for the next stay .... but obviously the mattresses are not cleaned as should be
My son did tell the staff they did apologise and said they would look into it ASAP ...not good enough those rooms should be 100% clean at all times
Photos are available if necessary
We love this place. Its expensive. But probably worth it because of the different facilities and play areas
Will definitely  be back, fantastic park, lots to do for all the family,very friendly  staff, clean cabin, can not fault this place . Thankyou

Wozers, what a big resort style park. Honestly one of the better we had stayed when compared to the other larger resort style.

Overall a great stay, the park has lots to offer, 2 jumping pillows, Play ground, water splash park, pool, water slides, movie space, pancakes breakfast, onsite cafe / bar, so so much to offer.

The site was great, level, concrete slab, grass palm trees, so so nice.

Yes the park is big, with LOTS of people, but it was still quiet at night, and reasonable in the day.

Reception and grounds team friendly and engaging.

Our only gripe is once again the Grey Nomads who drive around caravan parks like they are a V8 supercar driver, slow down people, kids can and will pop out of nowhere!

Special mention to Angus at reception. Thanks for your help, making us feel at home and your good work. From cooking the snags for the today show morning, flipping the pancake 🥞 and spotting us into an awesome site and extending our stay, you are an asset to the park
There were lots of fun things for kids to do here. There is a cafe on site and a supermarket 10 minutes walk away.
Not very clean but good entertainment for kids

This is the best Caravan Park we have ever been  so far. Great service, great facilities for the whole family.  We could easily spend a whole week here without going out. Perfect for a family with children. Highly recommend it.

My friends from Victoria stayed there, I was very impressed. Staff were friendly and it is truly kids heaven. (And for the parents as well). I think the housekeeping staff don't get enough recognition. They do amazing work, and the accommodation was truly spotless everything was there, nothing was forgotten or missed. So a big shout out to the house keeping crew!!!

What an absolutely amazing park! So many things to do in the park, the sites are generous in size and immaculately maintained. The grounds are superb, the staff are super friendly and helpful. There is nothing to criticise in this park. Highly recommend.

We had a powered site for 12 nights. Our adult kids and partners has the Tropical Cabins. Cabins small but functional. Our powered site was on the small side . We had issues with fronds and seed pods from the palm tree falling on caravan and car.lucky no lasting damage. Cafe and amenities are goodas were the pools and play areas for the kids. Have to say if we had a problem or issue it was resolved very quickly.we are very impressed.

Great camp-site.
Lots for the kids to do.
Helpful and friendly staff
Highly recommend

Some of the staff could be friendlier .
Not a lot of smiles most try to avoid contact instead of a smile 🤔😁
The water park is great and a lot of swimming pools too choose from.
The card payment system is great no looking for loose change anymore 👍

Wow, the best park we have stopped at. Exceptional facilities. If you are looking for family friendly park.... this is it, 3 pools with water slide. Amenities very clean. It's a very big park but we laid out. Plenty of cabins as well.

Hard to find your way around the grounds. Food mediocre at the Cafe, throw away bamboo Cutlery even if eating in, service mediocre from big 4. Charge a surcharge without advertising it and then blame the snackbar, well sorry they are operating under your umbrella so you are overall responsible to ensure things are done legally. They are employees working at big4, they should be treated with the same respect. Maybe even invited to big4 Christmas parties since you all work together to provide an enjoyable stay for guests,  if it wasn't for the cafe staff you wouldn't have food on site. Disgraceful to see such disregulation in a park like this. The customer service liaison was less than helpful and just wanted to wipe his hands of responsibility.
Place is overrun by unsupervised kids that are under the age of the policy that states kids are to be supervised under a certain age,  running/riding out in front of cars, cars parking in front of the Cafe blocking access in and out, Big4 staff no where in site to ensure this does not happen.
Smokers can smoke wherever, constantly had the smell of cigarettes in our camp area.
If you don't like car noise, don't stay here when a car event is on as the drags or burnouts were extremely loud until late. Which didn't bother us but is worth noting.

Positives - they gernie the gutters early in the morning, so you don't get to have a relaxing lay in on holidays.
The facilities are good if you can tolerate rude pushy kids without boundaries or parents who want to teach them to be respectful of others,  because it's happy hour and that's what they are there for. Parenting goes out the window at a place like this.
Big camp fridges you can use if you don't have the capacity in your own camp fridge. Camp kitchen gets super busy, so get in early if you need to use the facilities as people eat before they clean up after themselves so you either have to clean up their mess or wait it out.
Coming here as a family so our own kids could have fun, bit of a let down. As there really are not staff around to ensure that the park operates as a park and not a free for all free camp.

We have almost done a full lap with kid's in a caravan and this is top 3 parks we've stayed so far. The price was even descent compared to our other 2 favourites. It's the kind of park where you only have to leave to get groceries.  It has pool, spas, water slides, bars, adventure land, indoor play equipment, outdoor play area's and our van site was an easy access angled park with a raised pad. Would definitely reccomend a visit here
2 weeks of enjoyment

Absolutely loved our stay here. Was perfect for our daughter, with plenty to do.
The splash park was amazing, as to were the 2 pools. Plus lots of other activities. And the staff are all suoer friendly and helpful.
Just outside of Cairns, but still close enough with a 10 minute drive. Supermarkets close by to restock.
Will definitely stay here again. Thank you so much for an amazing stay.
One of the best caravan parks we ever stayed!

Cannot fault the grounds, they are stunning and so well looked after. The facilities for the kids are next level. Our only gripe is that the powered sites are so far away from the kids play areas so it was quite the mission to get there. Free pancakes on Thursdays... so much to do. It would be the perfect place to bring the family for school holidays
What a brilliant park. Clean, spacious, friendly and so much to do. Our grandchildren loved all of the activities and didn’t want to leave. We will definitely be back.

Booked well in advance and got a terrible caravan site where we didn't even fit! Got moved smack bang in the middle of families who didn't control their children and had no regard for other campers.
This park is only suited to families, not couples.
Great place to stay for families. The pools and activities are great.

This place is wonderful for a family! The Spa Villa suited our family of 4 easily! The room was clean and had everything we needed. The facilitates were great and super fun! The splash pad, jumping pillows, swimming pools and water slides were a huge hit.

The whole holiday park felt friendly and safe.
Park very organised & has everything you need. Facilities all good. Location handy & staff excellent. Highly recommend.

Everything about this place is amazing!
Special mention to Carla who did the water aerobics class (super fun!) and the onsite massage therapist Sonia- up there with one of the best massages I’ve ever had!!
We will definitely be back!
Everything is super clean, stuff very helpful and friendly. They have everything, even a petrol station!

Well presented and very well maintained. Huge park with decent size caravan sites. Staff are generally friendly but Brooke on reception could be a bit more customer focused as it is us customers paying her wage.

Very well managed accommodation with a lot of interesting and fun things for kids to do. Heated pools and hot tubs. The premium ensuite we had was clean and large. Only remark is that in the 6 days we were there it was not cleaned which I think is strange for this amount of nights. The shop and cafe provide a good variety of food. The massage was honestly the worst I ever had. Just a lot of rubbing and no real massage. I never had a massage where they did not massage your neck, upper shoulders and feet.
A great place for families and travellers. Good amenities and showers hot.  Wednesday morning pancakes at the cafe free for all was a nice touch.
A fabulous location for families.
Highly recommend giving water aerobics a go. So much to do at the park. Would bring the grandkids on a holiday here without question
Modern, spacious, clean amenities. Best I have seen anywhere in Australia and not even expensive compared to some other Caravan parks. Highly recommending and would return again!
Absolutely stunning except the kids water park needs attention, definitely doesn't look like the photos. Paint stripped off 80% of it and quite a few rust spots where potential harm could occur.
Rooms were clean and well appointmented, but the double bed was terrible. It needs replacing. It is like the sides had broken down due to people sitting on it all of its life.

Stayed in a cabin, which was fine.  Clean and tidy.  Was close to the tennis court and basketball court, therefore the road.  But it wasn't noisy at night, which I was afraid of.
Overall facilities for the site was awesome.  Great pools etc.

Probably one of the best  Big 4 I have been too.
This was a beautiful clean tidy park which was family friendly lovely staff highly recommend!!!

Must be one of the best holiday parks in Australia. So much entertainment and water parks for children that I was so pleased when I saw aqua aerobics was on 3 days per week and a bonus it was FREE! Carla is an amazing instructor and attending the sessions certainly made my holiday complete. I had an ensuite slab site which was spacious and private with trees between each site. Reception Staff are very helpful and groundsmen are prompt to pick-up fallen palm fronds. Camp kitchen has all the amenities needed and laundry was immaculately clean with all washers and dryers clean and working! With a well stocked kiosk, and licenced restaurant....one doesn’t need to leave the park.Thank you Cairns Coconut Resort for maintaining a fabulous park. Hopefully I'll be back next winter.

I made a mistake with my booking, my fault I accept that. Lady started well, offered me a room for the night, it started at 300, then 1 minute later after checking with her supervisor about if I can have a refund or more this over, it went up to 400.

In the end, it turns out she wasn’t very well trained or understood her role, asked me several times for the same information, I just said forget it and walked out. Obviously didn’t get a refund due to their terms and conditions but hey, if they can sleep better at night, what does it matter.

Facilities looked great though, too bad reception staff are not….

놀이터, 수영장이 잘되어 있는 캠핑장
시설이 크고 깨끗하다.
I love it way more than the annoying airbnbs in town.  No codes or hidden keys.  Clean and comfy beds.  Great water pressure.
Excelente para crianças. Tem bastante entretenimento. Estávamos em mororhome e utilizamos uma ensuite, ótima estrutura. Muito organizado e limpo.
Be wary of camp sites at rear of camp, railway track runs next to the fence. Thieves were about everything had to be locked away.
This holiday park is simply amazing for kids! The activities for them to do here is great! Would 100% come again.

We spent 10 days based at Big4 Ingenia coconut Cairns and found the place to be exceptionally awesome. The facilities that they had at the park were great. We actually enjoyed around of family putt putt golf. The amenities and the washing facilities for clothes or set out and the hot water in the showers was great. We totally enjoyed going to happy hour from 4 to 5 pm every afternoon and meeting other people there and chatting about every day life. If you’re looking for a family to enjoy your time at this is one place that I would recommend.

We had a fantastic time at the park. The grand kids joined us for 2 weeks and love the pool with the waterslide and also the spa. We met a lovely lady Karen who lives in the park that does dog sitting which made it so easy for us to go and do activities that we would not have been able to enjoy.
Plenty of things to do, very calm. Enjoyed my stay there.

Always stay there when in cairns
Very helpful staff

A perfect place to stop your caravan and spend some nights with family! It has swimming pools with water slides, mini golf course, a giant chess game, movie room for child, two giant jumping pillows, a basket ball court, playground and pedal carts to rent.  There is even a small shop for groceries and fast food.

During our trip from Brisbane to Cairns, we stayed at nine different places, and this was the best. We used an ensuite, and the quality of the restroom stood out. All the facilities were amazing, and a special thanks to the Brazilian reception attendant who was always kind  and helpful.

We had an awesome holiday!
3 bedroom superior cabin was spacious and had everything we needed.
Kids had a ball at all the facilities and the staff were super friendly  and helpful!
Lovely place .

We had a great time at Big4 Ingenia Coconut Cairns, it’s a great place, excellent facilities for the children, great restaurant and activities to do each day. Very safe park also. Will definitely be back to stay here again. One of the best parks we have been too

We were two families traveling together and we stayed at the coconut condo. It was well equipped and in front of the playground and next to one of the pools. The park is very big and has lots of activities. Both littles and bigs had a great time and didn’t have time to get bored!
Reef cruises departure is only a 15min drive.
Excellent park and activities for the kids. Quite well priced compared to others. Very clean amenities.
Overall a great place to stay while visiting Cairns. It is a little off the beaten path but transportation is pretty easy to manage.
great place with lots for the kids to be entertained with in school holidays
This place is so set up for familys .What more could they want .This has everything a family could want and then some to keep children happy and entertained .

Amazing. Would go back. Lots of activities for the kids in the school holidays for free which was great. Service was great, facilities were great and always clean. The cafe was also great! We’ll be back.

This is an amazing caravan park if you have a young family. So much to do without even leaving the park. No complaints about the actual park itself but theft is a big problem at this park. We had neighbours tell us about having people looking through their windows at night, bikes being stolen, my husband saw a young person hiding stolen items behind a bush on the fence line (security were informed). So if you stay at this park make sure everything with any value is locked up securely. Keep windows and doors locked. Not what you want to be worrying about when you are on holiday in beautiful FNQ!
Great great place to stay!

Best big4 we hv been too hands down
We would love to hv stayed longer , but not surprised its so booked out, so many activities for the kids , games room, movie nights, pools , water slides etc etc
Clean, friendly staff.
Highly rated
Will be back

We had an absolutely fantastic stay at Ingenia Holidays Cairns Coconut! This place is a true paradise for families with kids. The facilities are top-notch, with plenty to keep the little ones entertained. There are three big swimming areas and beautiful lagoons, perfect for a refreshing dip or some fun water play.

One of the highlights for us was the 24/7 café. The food was consistently good, and having access to delicious meals at any time was incredibly convenient. The site has everything you could possibly need, including a petrol station, making it a one-stop destination.

We enjoyed every moment and built some truly great memories here. Whether you're looking for relaxation or activities for the kids, Ingenia Holidays Cairns Coconut has it all. Highly recommended!
Great facilities, lots of activities for the kids & onsite store (including barista coffee) Would definitely stay again.

This caravan park is awesome ! It has a number of swimming pools, 2 with water slides, a mini golf course, a giant chess game, an outdoor movie, two giant jumping pillows, a basket ball court and a playground. We also hired pedal carts. The cabin was clean and roomy. The staff were polite and ready to help. There is a bus stop at the front door. There is even a small shop for groceries and fast food.
Awesome stay for the family awesome staff we really enjoyed our stay we will be back
Awesome caravan park, the facilities are great heaps of stuff to keep the kids entertained. We got the ensuite site and the ensuites are the best we’ve had would definitely recommend

Lovely park, great sites, good amenities, hot showers, loved Thursday free pancakes, so much to do in park. Close to shopping centres, and easy access to Cairns. Would definitely recommend and come back again
👍👌

I was very impressed with this caravan park having travelled from Victoria and seen many sad parks along the way. This was a high quality, huge park with the greatest array of kids activities I have seen in a park. It was well maintained and had everything you need there. But what impressed me the most was the care of the staff. My wife broke both ankles on a hike and needed surgery in the Cairns hospital. Miles from  home I was very alone but the manager Richard and his assistant Natalie were very caring, squeezing me in to their fully booked park and even discounting their rates for me. They frequently asked after her during her 12 day stay in hospital and couldn't do enough to help even offering their disabled unit and equipment. They were an answer to prayer in our real time of need.
Love the place very good for family holiday....get the kids to do daily activities keep them beasy and happy throughout the holidays..
Great stay with the children.  So much entertainment available with brilliant staff.

It beautiful places to stay for Five days.
Friendly staff and very helpful.
See you soon ❤️ 🐢🏖

Such a wonderful park, so well run and maintained. It's quite a big park but very well laid out. Found the main road a little noisy staying in a tent but earplugs helped the second night. We live in Cairns but came for a staycation & will be back as the kids love it and it has a laid back holiday vibe  😎

The staff were very friendly.  The activities that they put on for the kids were great.  I had kids ranging from 4-8 years old and they were all really engaged in every activity they did, which is not easy to pull off.  Stayed 3 nights and barely left the resort.

So much to do. 10/10
A kids heaven.

Not very flexible when you find you need to cancel, change type of accommodation or need refund. Even with over 3 weeks notice. Even though they say we booked no refund option we did not find on line or when we spoke on the phone when they wanted our deposit paid straight away. We were also told that a 15% extra was all required for flexibilities.  The 15% is $9. We would have happily paid the $9 had this been clear.  We found them very unhelpful when they've held out deposit for 2 months. Extremely disappointing when we've had a great experience with them in the past.

Started well with super helpful staff on the phone.

Arrived to be told our rate was approx. $20 higher than quoted on the phone. The lady dealing with us was incredibly rude and dismissive. I was flat out called a liar by the manager - he was short, rude and refused any possibility I could have been told the wrong rate.

Lo and behold I received a call shortly after from the other site manager (who clearly knows how to do her job and provide a level of customer service) to be told I had in fact been quoted a cheaper rate and a credit had been added to my account.

When returning to the office to collect the credit I was served by the same lady as I was at check in. I mentioned that I had a credit as I was in fact quoted the lower rate. I was then lectured on how I was still somehow wrong, despite having an apology message on my phone and credit being issued - the sheer rudeness and arrogance is something I’ve never experienced before in any situation like this.

The site has great facilities and other staff were awesome but it was entirely let down by this shockingly rude lady at the front counter and the male manager.
It was an enjoyable but overall it needs some much needed maintenance/upgrade done to the facilities and rooms.

Not only is this caravan park a mouthful (BIG 4 Ingenia Holidays Cairns Coconut) but it also has everything! This park is the absolute definition of resort-style parks. It is also a kids paradise with everything from mini-golf course, two pools - one with waterslides, a splash park (more slides!), two jumping pillows under shade and a large playground. There are also spas for the adults in the pool sections. There’s a very tropical feel with palms throughout the park and all different options of accommodation from different cabin styles to different types of ensuite van sites down to simple slab and grass sites.

Our tip is when giving the park the size of your caravan or rig, it is worth giving them an undersized figure. Our van easily fitted on a site that was supposedly too small for the length of our set up.

Highly recommend staying here, the family and I really enjoyed our stay. Great facilities and even better staff. A special shout out to the Irish guys Max and Owen. They were extremely helpful throughout our stay and kept the grounds in pristine condition, especially the tennis court!
Bloody awesome place to bring kids. The facilities are incredible. Very family friendly

We are staying at the Cairns BIG 4 Caravan Park. We had a personal situation which we were desperate to extend our stay. We approached Angus at reception for help, this young man (and no doubt his fellow team members) spent considerable time and effort to work out a way they could help. It is a busy time of the year and it hard to express our appreciation for firstly solving our problem but also the approach, Angus in particular, in listening to us. BIG THANKS.
Rob and Wendy Davidson

What a well run park. All the facilities are spotless, staff literally everywhere, cheerful and keen to ensure your stay goes well. Ten minute drive from the centre of Cairns. An amazing waterpark for the kids to exhaust themselves in and even an off lead area for the dogs with agility exercises to try the grey matter with. Finally, the grounds are lush and inviting, made even more so by the comparatively large sites that ensure you are not living on top of each other. There is a cafe and bar area too. Everyone is covered off
No hesitation in recommending this park as a base to explore the Cairns region.
4th visit, absolutely amazing place ❤️

Great place to relax with family
Plenty to keep the kids happy aswell as the big kids (adults)
Restaurant / shop, alcohol, fuel on site

We stayed for 7 nights with our 7yo son. The atmosphere was very family orientated which was lovely. The park was spotless and well maintained as was our Villa (Luxury Lagoon Villa) which was located right next to the lagoon pool and spa, where we visited 1-3 times everyday as Mr 7 loved it, as did we, along with the waterslides and splashzone and mini golf!
The cafe food was lovely also and the front end staff helped book our tours/transfers.
Only 1 thing negative was the waterslide guards need to learn to smile :)

Welcoming, friendly staff. The amenities are good, clean and functional. Easy access to well established sites, offering the opportunity for sun and shade.
Children play facilities are of a high standard and well away from camp sites. We enjoyed our stay.

We often visit when family and friends from out of town are staying at the resort. The resort is well looked after and very kid friendly so if you're looking for a holiday with lots to do for the kids then this is the place.
Great place for families, friendly staff, clean cabins, comfy beds. Will be back again
Awesome place, great for kids, close to city, pretty pricey but i guess you get what you pay for

Sehr schöne und gepflegte Anlage. Super freundliches Personal. Am letzten Tag durften wir noch unkompliziert länger den Pool benutzen, da unser Flug erst am Abend ging.
Für in die Stadt kann man den Bus nehmen, oder ein Uber (ca 25 AUS). Die Autobahn hört man etwas, aber nicht tragisch.
Fabulous park to stay in.
Lock your stuff up at all times.  Visitors can get cars and caravan stolen, bikes and usual little things.
Grounds  were clean, facilities were good. Accommodation was ok, uncomfortable beds
Kids loved it here there is so much to do for them . Nice and relaxing for the parents. Found the drive into Cairns and around was very easy.

Unfortunately, I had an extremely disappointing experience with late check-in at this location. Despite being assured that the key and information would be in the late check-in safe box, I arrived early morning after a long overnight international flight with two kids, only to find no key in the box. We were then forced to wait around for the office to open. When I finally spoke with someone about the issue, they were extremely rude and merely explained that someone must have removed the keys. If you have a late check-in, I strongly recommend choosing a different location.
The staff are happy to help and friendly. It's always clean and well maintained. There are heaps of activities for the kids to do.

I arrived on a Wednesday night, got a quiet site just to stay the night.
They have a warm spa, pool and play areas. And on Thursday morning they have free pancakes!
They have activities almost everyday. Friday and Saturday is outdoor movies!
So much fun

I just do not recommend the massage. I was in pain, so I booked remedial massage and when I left I was feeling worst then before. I need some pain killers to manage my day.

We were day visitors. The cafe/shop was nice and the staff in there were lovely. The kids loved the facilities, but there was one life guard who seemed to be randomly telling various (not just mine) children off. Having watched them for a while, I came to the conclusion that he was grumpy and taking it out on the various kids there. The place seemed clean and maintained. Our friend's cabin looked small, but good.
